brief: Bugun bosh sahifasi — o'quvchi kirganda dashboard (retention 2-bosqich)

goals.title: Ma'lumot tekshiruv
goals.objective: chatId init, myResults/todoItems/progressData shakllari, auto-select bor-yo'qligi

goals.title: Bugun ekrani
goals.objective: bo'sh holat o'rniga dashboard: salom+streak+countdown, bugungi reja, davom etish, diagnostik CTA, tez amallar

goals.title: Kirish oqimi
goals.objective: login'dan keyin o'quvchi Bugun ekraniga tushishi (auto-chat-select bo'lsa o'chirish)
